feature_tested: Executive Command Center - Multi-Outlet Health Dashboard
summary: All 12 backend API tests passed (100%). Frontend testing verified all Executive Command panel features: health overview with role-based outlet visibility, outlet detail with KPIs/labor/top items/trend, cross-outlet comparison, custom thresholds editor, and AI morning briefing generation.

endpoints: GET /api/executive/health-overview?user_id=usr-chef-001 - Returns 3 outlets (exec chef culinary scope) with health scores
GET /api/executive/health-overview?user_id=usr-gm-001 - Returns all 5 outlets (GM sees everything) with resort_health=62, critical=1, warning=1
GET /api/executive/outlet/main-dining - Returns full metrics (revenue $172,227, FC 26.3%, covers 4971), top items, meal periods, 7-day trend, labor breakdown
GET /api/executive/outlet/sky-bar - Returns metrics showing lowest health score (~39)
GET /api/executive/compare - Returns comparison table sorted by revenue with needs_attention list (2 outlets)
GET /api/executive/thresholds - Returns user thresholds (custom or defaults)
POST /api/executive/thresholds - Updates custom thresholds for a user
POST /api/executive/morning-briefing - Generates AI narrative with outlet summaries and OT alerts using Emergent LLM
Health score status mapping verified (>=75 healthy, >=50 warning, <50 critical)
Outlet alerts generated for high food cost and waste metrics

verified_elements: App loads successfully without errors
Executive Command button visible in FINANCIAL & SUPPLY sidebar section
Executive Command panel loads with data-testid='executive-command-panel'
Panel header shows 'EXECUTIVE COMMAND CENTER'
User selector dropdown with 4 users (Chef, F&B Director, GM, Owner)
Resort Health ring shows composite score (62 for GM, 89 for Chef)
Health Overview tab shows outlet cards with health dials
Exec Chef (usr-chef-001) sees 3 outlets: main-dining, banquet-hall, main-kitchen
GM (usr-gm-001) sees all 5 outlets including sky-bar and pool-cafe
SkyBar card shows red/critical status (health 39)
Aqua Cafe card shows amber/warning status (health 58)
Main Dining card shows green/healthy status (health 89)
Outlet cards show metrics: Revenue, Food Cost%, Bev Cost%, Avg Check, Covers, Waste%
Outlet cards show alerts when metrics exceed thresholds
Click outlet card navigates to Outlet Detail tab
Outlet Detail shows KPIs section with 6 metrics
Outlet Detail shows Labor section with department breakdown and OT%
Outlet Detail shows Top Menu Items table with Qty, Revenue, FC%, Margin
Outlet Detail shows 7-Day Trend table with Date, Revenue, Covers, Txns
Alert Settings tab shows threshold editor
Threshold table has Green/Amber/Red columns
Edit button toggles threshold editing mode
Compare Outlets tab shows Cross-Outlet Comparison table
Comparison sorted by revenue (descending)
'2 need attention' badge visible for outlets with health <60
Morning Briefing tab triggers AI generation
EchoAi³ Morning Briefing header and narrative displayed
Outlet summary cards show health scores and alert counts

critical_code_review_comments: Role-based outlet visibility works correctly: exec_chef sees culinary outlets (3), GM sees all (5)
Health score calculation uses composite of food_cost, bev_cost, waste, avg_check with configurable thresholds
Outlets without POS data (banquet-hall, main-kitchen) correctly show 'No Data' status
AI morning briefing uses real Emergent LLM Key for narrative generation
Custom thresholds persist per user and affect health score calculations
test_credentials: No auth required - dev mode. Test users: usr-chef-001 (exec_chef, 3 outlets), usr-gm-001 (GM, all 5 outlets), usr-fbd-001 (director), usr-owner-001 (owner)
seed_data_creation: Simulation data exists with POS transactions: main-dining (4971 covers), sky-bar (775 covers), pool-cafe (1017 covers). banquet-hall and main-kitchen have no direct POS data (expected).
context_for_next_testing_agent: Executive Command Center fully functional. Health scores: SkyBar ~39 (critical), Aqua Cafe ~58 (warning), Main Dining ~89 (healthy). Resort health for GM is ~62. Default thresholds: food_cost 22/26/30, labor 25/30/35, waste 1/1.5/2.5. AI morning briefing uses real Emergent LLM. Toast POS and QuickBooks remain MOCKED.

mocked_apis.AI Morning Briefing: Uses real Emergent LLM Key (not mocked)
